condition_specific: heart disease, illnesses resulting from heart disease
statute_citation: Michigan Worker's Disability Compensation Act of 1969, Act 317, § 418.405(1)
notes: Covers full-time members of fully paid fire departments (city, township, village, airport county/public authority/state university, or public fire authority). Disease must develop or manifest during active service. Presumption applies in absence of evidence to the contrary (§418.405(3)). As condition precedent, claimant must first apply for pension benefits or demonstrate ineligibility.

condition_specific: respiratory diseases, illnesses resulting from respiratory diseases
statute_citation: Michigan Worker's Disability Compensation Act of 1969, Act 317, § 418.405(1)
notes: Covers full-time members of fully paid fire departments (city, township, village, airport county/public authority/state university, or public fire authority). Disease must develop or manifest during active service. Presumption applies in absence of evidence to the contrary (§418.405(3)). As condition precedent, claimant must first apply for pension benefits or demonstrate ineligibility.

condition_specific: heart disease, illnesses resulting from heart disease
statute_citation: Michigan Worker's Disability Compensation Act of 1969, Act 317, § 418.405(1)
notes: Covers full-time members of fully paid police departments (city, township, village), county sheriffs and deputies, members of state police, conservation officers, and motor carrier enforcement division officers. Disease must develop or manifest during active service. Presumption applies in absence of evidence to the contrary. Pension application required as condition precedent.

condition_specific: respiratory diseases, illnesses resulting from respiratory diseases
statute_citation: Michigan Worker's Disability Compensation Act of 1969, Act 317, § 418.405(1)
notes: Covers full-time members of fully paid police departments, county sheriffs and deputies, state police members, conservation officers, and motor carrier enforcement division officers. Disease must develop or manifest during active service. Presumption applies in absence of evidence to the contrary. Pension application required as condition precedent.

condition_specific: respiratory tract, bladder, skin, brain, kidney, blood, thyroid, testicular, prostate, lymphatic, ovarian, breast, non-HPV cervical cancer
statute_citation: Michigan Worker's Disability Compensation Act of 1969, Act 317, § 418.405(2)
notes: Covers full-time fire department members (all service lengths) and, beginning January 1, 2022 for cancers diagnosed on or after January 1, 2022, part-time, paid on-call, and volunteer members. Also covers former members from any of those categories. Requires 60 months (5 years) active service at time of cancer manifestation. Member must have been exposed to hazards incidental to fire suppression, rescue, or EMS duties. Claim is made against the Christopher R. Slezak First Responder Presumed Coverage Fund (not the employer) — employer claim is suspended during fund benefit receipt. Presumption applies only to claims against the Fund. Tobacco rebuttal: rebuttable by scientific evidence that claimant was a substantial and consistent user of tobacco products within 10 years preceding injury and that use was a significant factor in cancer cause/aggravation/progression. Pension application required as condition precedent.

condition_specific: respiratory tract, bladder, skin, brain, kidney, blood, thyroid, testicular, prostate, lymphatic, ovarian, breast, non-HPV cervical cancer
statute_citation: Michigan Worker's Disability Compensation Act of 1969, Act 317, § 418.405(2)
notes: Volunteer members (and former volunteer members) eligible for cancer presumption beginning January 1, 2022 for cancers diagnosed on or after January 1, 2022. Requires 60 months (5 years) active service at time of cancer manifestation. Exposure to fire suppression/rescue/EMS hazards required. Claims go against the Christopher R. Slezak First Responder Presumed Coverage Fund; fund is considered employer for volunteer members. Forest fire officers and fire/crash rescue officers also covered for same cancer list. Tobacco rebuttal provision applies. Pension application required as condition precedent.
